known_limitations: Minimal reproducer of Sturdy Finance read-only reentrancy via Balancer B-stETH
Citation: https://rekt.news/sturdy-rekt/ — Sturdy Finance loses 442 ETH (~$800K) to read-only reentrancy (Jun 12 2023)
Vulnerable pattern: Balancer pool price read during flash-loan context — stale during callback
Critical action gated by state: borrow() against inflated B-stETH collateral price
